eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Mason; Thurston, WA; at 8:19 AM on JUN 3, 2019 Effective until 11:19 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is Thurston County conducting a test of the Emergency Alert System.  In the event of an emergency, this system would bring you important information.  The following tones will conclude this test.
